REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS 3515-17-19 SACRAMENTO STREET AND MILOSH CVETKOVIC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 24, 2019. BY NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 6, 2019 MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF LIMITED TO THE FOLLOWING: (1) IDENTIFY ANTI-SLAPP CASE(S) IN THE MOVING PAPERS FACTUALLY SIMILAR TO THE CASE AT BAR; AND (2) SPECIFY WHICH FACTS ARE ANALOGOUS TO THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THE FAVORABLE DECISION IN CONTROLLING AUTHORITY REFERENCED IN SECTION (1). IF BRIEF IS NON-RESPONSIVE OR EXCEEDS THE ABOVE-STATED PARAMETERS, IT WILL BE STRICKEN IN ITS ENTIRETY. OPPOSING PARTY MAY FILE A RESPONSE TO SEPTEMBER 6, 2019 BRIEF BY SEPTEMBER 17, 2019. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

By no later than September 6, 2019 moving party to provide a supplemental brief limited to the following: (1) identify ANTI-SLAPP case(s) in the moving papers factually similar to the case at bar; and (2) specify which facts are analogous to the facts giving rise to the favorable decision in controlling authority referenced in section (1).
